title: 豆浆你提我造 soybean fun item
description: a series fun item.It's just an item mod, it has telescopes that can make thunder, ships that can fly, and all kinds of weird stuff...
body:
Thunder Mirror: A telescope that will cause thunder wherever you look
Sky Ship: A ship that flies freely in the sky
Frost Ship: Can freeze water directly and move quickly on ice
Detection Staff: Can detect minerals directly
And enchanted blue apples, enchanted red apples, enchanted green apples, etc.
And more than ten kinds of talismans!!
My channel is still making various items that viewers want
If you have ideas, please follow me
Soymilk is not stupid

大雷之镜：看到哪里就会打雷的望眼镜
天空船：在天空自由飞行的船
冰霜船：可以直接冻结水，在冰上快速移动
探测法杖：直接可以探测到矿物
以及附魔蓝苹果，附魔红苹果，附魔绿苹果等等
以及十多种符箓！！
我的频道还在继续制作各种各样观众想的物品
如果你也有想法请关注我
豆浆不是笨蛋
